overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through an Old West town. The character moves from a covered wooden porch onto a dirt main street, passing wooden storefronts and approaching a horse-drawn carriage on an overcast day.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden boardwalk of frontier town

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the covered wooden porch, moving past storefronts

notable_agents.action: man standing on the porch near a barrel, observing the street

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the covered walkway
dark wooden storefront with white-trimmed windows and doors
white-painted wooden posts supporting the porch roof
overhead metal roof providing shelter over the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered wooden porch in a frontier town. The cowboy character walks along the weathered boardwalk, passing a wooden building facade on the left. A man stands near a barrel on the porch, while support pillars and a corrugated metal awning provide partial cover overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt main street of western town

events.description: character steps off the wooden porch onto the open dirt road, exiting the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: character continues walking down the center of the dirt road, moving away from the porch into the open street

entered.detail: reddish-brown dirt main street with wagon wheel ruts and sparse grass patches
prominent two-story wooden building with ornate white balcony railings and faded red paint
wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires running along the street

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the covered porch onto the open dirt main street. The scene opens up to reveal a wide dirt road flanked by wooden buildings. A prominent two-story hotel with ornate white balconies dominates the left side as the character walks past, while telegraph poles line the street ahead under an overcast sky.

events.description: character approaches a stationary horse-drawn carriage on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: character walks toward the sheriff office and slows slightly while approaching the horse-drawn carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage stationary on the right side of the dirt road
two horses harnessed to the carriage, standing still

entered.detail: small wooden building with 'SHERIFF OFFICE' sign above the porch and white trim
wooden wagon with driver seated on top, parked on the roadside

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the dirt road approaching the Sheriff Office on the right. A horse-drawn carriage with two harnessed horses is stationary on the roadside. The telegraph poles that were distant are now passing by on the left as the character nears the carriage and the small wooden sheriff's building with its prominent signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sheltered confines of a wooden porch into the open expanse of a frontier town's main street. It begins on a weathered boardwalk under a corrugated metal awning, passing a man standing by a barrel beside a wooden building facade. As the character steps off the porch, the scene opens up to reveal a wide dirt road flanked by wooden structures, most notably a two-story hotel with ornate white balconies under an overcast sky. The camera then continues forward, passing telegraph poles on the left as the environment shifts toward the town's center. Finally, the movement leads toward a stationary horse-drawn carriage and the small wooden Sheriff's Office with its prominent signage on the right.
